name: Diabetic Fruitcake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine the first five ingredients: diced orange peel, diced lemon peel, diced dates, golden raisins, and brandy or orange juice.
2. Add baking powder, baking soda, allspice, flour, vegetable oil, brown sugar, eggs, chopped pecans, and pineapple chunks (reserve some for garnish).
3. Mix well until all ingredients are thoroughly combined.
4. Pour the batter into greased baking cups, filling each approximately 2/3 full.
5. Top each cup with a small piece of pineapple.
6. Bake at 325°F for 30-35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Allow to cool completely before removing from the cups.
Yield: 12 cakes
Exchange: 1 cake = bread, 1 fruit, 2 fats (1 cake ≈ 12 calories)
